texto: Liao writes with the courage of a man who knows loss and doesn't fear it. There is nothing to make him notice like an official injunction against noticing, nothing to make him listen like official deafness, nothing that drives him to make us see like the blindness that officialdom seeks to impose.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Liao Yiwu: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “Liao writes with the courage of a man who knows loss and doesn't fear it. There is nothing to mak…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que coragem, freedom-of-expression, persecution-of-authors pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e persecution-of-authors.

texto: In these remote corners, I have discovered a center point, where East met West, and although there has been a collision of cultures, there is now a new Christian identity that is distinctly Chinese. The circuitous mountain path in Yunnan province is red because over many years it has been soaked with blood.
explicacao: Citação de Liao Yiwu sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In these remote corners, I have discovered a center point, where East met West, and although ther…” articula reflexao, china, christianity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como christianity e communism.
